{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Ninecloud madra
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The containment around the [[Ninecloud madra]] was broken.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The fuel for the [[Ninecloud madra]] had mostly faded into useless [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
